configuration.sifli.title: SiFli Extension Configuration
configuration.sifli.powershellPath.descr: Path to PowerShell executable. Leave empty to auto-detect `pwsh` first, then fall back to Windows PowerShell. (e.g., C:\Program Files\PowerShell\7\pwsh.exe)
configuration.sifli.embeddedPythonPath.d: Path to the embedded Python directory. If set, the extension will use this Python environment.
configuration.sifli.useEmbeddedPython.de: Whether to use the embedded Python environment provided by SiFli (Windows only).
configuration.sifli.sdkConfigs.descripti: List of installed SiFli SDK configurations. Each entry contains path and optional toolchain path.
configuration.sifli.customBoardSearchPat: Optional: Absolute or relative path to a directory containing custom SiFli board configurations. (e.g., C:\MyBoards or ../my_boards)
configuration.sifli.peripheralViewer.svd: Path to the SVD file used by the built-in Peripheral Viewer. Absolute paths are supported; relative paths are resolved from the workspace folder. A launch.json coreConfigs[].peripheralViewerSvdFile value overrides this setting.
configuration.sifli.peripheralViewer.add: If the gap between register addresses is smaller than this threshold, they are read in a single memory request.
configuration.sifli.workflows.descriptio: Workflow definitions. Use workspace settings for team sharing; user-level entries with the same id override workspace entries.
configuration.sifli.statusBar.buttons.de: Status bar button definitions for workflows/commands. Use existing ids (compile/rebuild/clean/download/menuconfig/deviceMonitor/sifliTerminal) to override default buttons.
configuration.sifli.serialMonitor.lineEn: Default line ending appended when sending string data from the serial monitor.
configuration.sifli.serialMonitor.openDt: DTR control signal value applied after opening a serial monitor session.
configuration.sifli.serialMonitor.openRt: RTS control signal value applied after opening a serial monitor session.
configuration.sifli.serialMonitor.resetD: DTR control signal value used during the serial reset pulse.
configuration.sifli.serialMonitor.resetR: RTS control signal value used during the serial reset pulse.
configuration.sifli.serialMonitor.resetA: Duration in milliseconds to hold reset control signals active.
configuration.sifli.serialMonitor.resetS: Delay in milliseconds after restoring idle control signals.
configuration.sifli.mcp.enabled.descript: Enable the embedded MCP server capability for SiFli SDK CodeKit.
configuration.sifli.mcp.autoStart.descri: Start the embedded MCP server automatically when the extension activates.
configuration.sifli.mcp.host.description: Host address for the embedded MCP server.
configuration.sifli.mcp.port.description: Port for the embedded MCP server. Use 0 to let the OS choose a free port.
configuration.sifli.mcp.fixedToken.descr: Optional fixed Bearer token for the embedded MCP server. Leave empty to generate a random token each time.
lmTool.getProjectState.modelDescription: Get the current SiFli project state, including board, serial port, SDK, workflow counts, and monitor state.
lmTool.listWorkflows.modelDescription: List workflows defined for the current SiFli project, grouped by workspace or user scope.
lmTool.listWorkflows.scope.description: Which workflow scope to list: workspace, user, or all.
lmTool.listBoards.modelDescription: List available SiFli boards for the current project and indicate which board is selected.
lmTool.listSerialPorts.modelDescription: List available serial ports and baud rate options for the current SiFli project.
lmTool.runWorkflow.modelDescription: Run a workflow that is configured in the current SiFli project without opening interactive UI prompts.
lmTool.runWorkflow.workflowRef.descripti: Workflow reference in the form workspace:<id> or user:<id>.
lmTool.runWorkflow.inputs.description: Workflow input values keyed by input name.
lmTool.compile.modelDescription: Compile the current SiFli project in the background and return the result summary.
lmTool.rebuild.modelDescription: Clean and compile the current SiFli project.
lmTool.clean.modelDescription: Delete the current SiFli build output directory.
lmTool.download.modelDescription: Flash the current SiFli build to the selected device.
lmTool.selectBoard.modelDescription: Select the active SiFli board and optionally update the build thread count.
lmTool.selectBoard.boardName.description: Exact SiFli board name to select.
lmTool.selectBoard.numThreads.descriptio: Optional build thread count to set with the board selection.
lmTool.selectSerialPort.modelDescription: Select the download serial port and optionally set the download baud rate.
lmTool.selectSerialPort.port.description: Exact download serial port path to select.
lmTool.openMonitor.modelDescription: Open the serial monitor using the persisted log serial port.
lmTool.closeMonitor.modelDescription: Close the active serial monitor session.
configuration.probeRs.title: SiFli probe-rs Debugger
configuration.probeRs.debuggerExecutable:
Path to the `probe-rs` executable. If unset, the extension first uses the bundled SiFli `probe-rs` managed by the extension, then falls back to `probe-rs` on the system PATH.

Note: Setting `runtimeExecutable` in 'launch.json' overrides this setting.
debugger.probeRs.label: SiFli probe-rs Debugger
